direct_process_pack.name: AetherMoore Behind-the-Scenes Writing Process Pack
direct_process_pack.note: Separate making-of/process material. It does not include the KDP book manuscript, so the books can remain in KDP Select.

books.title: The Miracle Was The Memory
books.subtitle: A Human Reading of Jesus, Empire, and the Stories That Would Not Die
books.author: Issac Daniel Davis

direct_ebook.rights_note: The book manuscript stays on KDP/KDP Select. A separate behind-the-scenes process pack is sold directly on AetherMoore.

reader_fit: Readers who want Jesus read through memory, empire, grief, and survival.
Church groups, history readers, and people who want a human-language bridge into the story.
People who care how stories survive when institutions try to own them.
process: Cover and proof review before public listing

books.title: The Six Tongues Protocol
books.subtitle: Book One
books.author: Issac Daniel Davis
books.positioning: The code IS the magic system.

direct_ebook.rights_note: The book manuscript stays on KDP/KDP Select. A separate behind-the-scenes process pack is sold directly on AetherMoore.

reader_fit: Readers who want sci-fi, isekai, and LitRPG where code is the magic system.
People following the Sacred Tongues and SCBE worldbuilding layer.
Builders who want story as a training surface, not just lore.
process: Public listing used as a durable reference artifact
